title: Transaction Logs for Digital Product Sales Explained for Digital Creators — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: Trying to sell ebooks, courses, or digital products online without PayPal can be a frustrating experience, especially if you're from Nigeria, Ghana, or other countries with strict payment processing regulations. You're not alone. Many creators struggle to find a reliable platform to sell their digital downloads, and it's not just about the fees – it's about access to customers, too. In this post, we'll break down how to manage transaction logs for digital product sales without PayPal, and explore what tools can help you get started. Let's dive in.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Transaction logs are a record of every sale, payment, and delivery made through your digital product store. It's essential to track these details, especially when selling digital goods online, as they provide a clear picture of your sales performance and help you identify any potential issues. Without proper transaction logging, it's challenging to keep track of your orders, payments, and customer satisfaction – all critical factors in building a successful online business.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

When you use platforms like PayPal, Stripe, or Gumroad, they often require you to set up a merchant account, which can be a barrier for creators in restricted countries. NOWPayments, our preferred payment processor, offers a cryptocurrency-based solution that bypasses these restrictions, allowing you to receive payments from customers worldwide. Our Admin Dashboard ($29.99) integrates seamlessly with NOWPayments, providing you with instant access to transaction logs, order management, and real-time analytics – no matter where you're based.
Who This Is Built For and Why

Our solution is specifically designed for digital creators who face geographical restrictions or banking limitations when trying to sell their digital products online. Whether you're an author selling ebooks, a course creator, or a designer offering templates and fonts, our tools help you overcome the challenges of payment processing and focus on what matters most – creating and selling your digital wares. By leveraging our Admin Dashboard and NOWPayments, you can reach a global audience without the hassle of traditional payment platforms.
Every sale, payment, and delivery is tracked and recorded in our transaction logs, providing a clear picture of your sales performance.
The Components That Make It Work Together

To get started, you'll need to set up an account on our Shop platform (https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html), where you can create your digital product store and integrate the Admin Dashboard. This will give you access to transaction logs, order management, and real-time analytics. Next, you'll need to configure NOWPayments as your preferred payment processor, ensuring seamless and secure transactions for your customers. With these components working together, you'll be able to track your sales, payments, and deliveries with ease.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

To get started with managing transaction logs for digital product sales without PayPal, follow these steps: Set up an account on our Shop platform and integrate the Admin Dashboard. Configure NOWPayments as your preferred payment processor. Test your payment setup to ensure seamless transactions. Monitor your transaction logs and adjust your sales strategy accordingly. By following these steps, you'll be well on your way to building a successful online business that reaches a global audience.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

The fastest path to your first crypto-native digital product sale is a three-step process. First, set up NOWPayments — create an account, configure your wallet address, get your API key. Second, deploy the Core Shop Engine with your product file and NOWPayments credentials. Third, configure Web3 Wallet Connect with your checkout settings and product details. At that point, your store accepts crypto payments and delivers the product automatically. The complete setup, following the included deployment guide, takes most creators two to four hours from start to first test transaction. The Full Stack Bundle at $79.99 includes all three components plus the deployment guide and support access. For a creator who cannot use PayPal or Stripe, this is the infrastructure that makes selling digital products viable.
Our Admin Dashboard ($29.99) offers real-time analytics, allowing you to monitor your sales and adjust your strategy accordingly.
